description: Report to a vizier of al-Ḥāfiẓ from a military official. The sender refers to previous petitions, and also makes a new request for a rescript. Dating: second quarter of the 6th/12th century. (Information from Khan, ALAD.) EMS
tags: Report, Officials, internal memorandum, Petition, caliph, State
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
